title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget amounting to Six Million Five Hundred Eighty-Two Thousand Two Hundred Twenty-Nine Pesos and 89/100 (Php 6,582,229.89) chargeable against the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund CY 2024 and One Million Seven Hundred Fifty-Seven Thousand Two Hundred Pesos and 00/100 (Php 1,757,200.00) chargeable against the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund CY 2024 - continuing appropriation
